title: Focus and link discrete legend groups
description: Opt-in legend controls preview locally, commit stable row keys to a shared controller, and de-emphasize unrelated marks without changing scales, statistics, layout, or color identity. The same semantic mask drives SVG and canvas views.

journey.pointer: Hover a discrete legend entry to preview one plot, then click to pin the group across all three views.
journey.keyboard: Tab to a legend entry, use arrow keys or Home and End to move, press Enter or Space to pin, and Escape to clear.
journey.touch: Tap a legend entry to pin it across the SVG and canvas views; tap the active entry or Clear legend focus to reset.
